documents.titleEn: Announcement of Environmental Targets FY 2025 — Chalermprakiat Building
documents.owner: สำนักวิจัยและส่งเสริมวิชาการการเกษตร
documents.issuingAuthority: ผู้ช่วยศาสตราจารย์ ดร.ณัฐพล เลาห์รอดพันธุ์ (ผู้อำนวยการสำนักวิจัยฯ)
documents.notes: Single-page signed announcement of environmental targets using FY2568 as baseline. Targets: electricity ≤5,252.55 units/person, fuel ≤255.52 liters, water ≤53.30 cu.m./person, paper ≤23.13 kg/person, general waste ≤50 kg/person, GHG ≤203.15 kgCO2e/person. Signed by Asst.Prof.Dr. Nattapon Laoharodphan. OCR-derived text requires human verification for numeric values.

documents.issuingAuthority: คณะกรรมการดำเนินงานสำนักงานสีเขียว
documents.notes: Comprehensive 21-page action plan covering all 7 categories (1: Policy & Planning, 2: Communication, 3: Resources & Energy, 4: Waste Management, 5: Environment & Safety, 6: GHG, 7: Continuity). Includes plans for internal audit and LESS project for certification upgrade. Contains personal names of responsible persons. OCR required as scanned document.

documents.notes: Only PDF with embedded text (no OCR needed). Describes 4 feedback channels: QR code on website, online form (Google Forms), email (raemju@gmail.com), phone (0 5387 3400). Contains personal email address and phone number that should be reviewed before public publication. Flowchart on page 2. Improvement procedures on page 3.
